SEARCH
Package com.example.service

Class PaymentService

java.lang.Object
com.example.service.PaymentService
@Service public class PaymentService extends Object
Service class responsible for handling payment operations like adding credit cards, initiating payments, and OTP verification.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PaymentService(TransactionRepository transactionRepository, CreditCardRepository creditCardRepository)

  • Constructor Details

    • PaymentService

      @Autowired public PaymentService(TransactionRepository transactionRepository, CreditCardRepository creditCardRepository)

  • Method Details

    • addCreditCard

      public CreditCard addCreditCard(CreditCard creditCard)
      Adds a new credit card to the repository.
      Parameters:
      creditCard - the CreditCard object containing card details to be added
      Returns:
      the saved CreditCard object

    • updateCreditCard

      public CreditCard updateCreditCard(CreditCard creditCard)
      Update the credit card details.
      Parameters:
      creditCard - The credit card details to update.
      Returns:
      The updated CreditCard object.

    • deleteCreditCard

      public void deleteCreditCard(String cardNumber)
      Deletes a credit card by its card number.
      Parameters:
      cardNumber - The credit card number to delete.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the card is not found.

    • getAllCreditCards

      public List<CreditCard> getAllCreditCards()
      Fetch all credit cards from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of all stored credit cards.

    • initiatePayment

      public Transaction initiatePayment(String cardNumber, String cardType, String cvv, BigDecimal amount)
      Initiates a payment process for a given credit card. Validates card details, checks the available balance, generates OTP, and creates a pending transaction.
      Parameters:
      cardNumber - the card number of the credit card
      cardType - card type
      cvv - the CVV of the credit card
      amount - the amount to be charged
      Returns:
      the created Transaction object with pending status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the card number, CVV, or balance is invalid

    • verifyOtp

      public Transaction verifyOtp(String transactionId, String otp)
      Verifies the OTP for a given transaction. If the OTP is valid and not expired, the transaction is approved, and the balance is deducted from the credit card.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - the ID of the transaction being verified
      otp - the OTP provided by the user
      Returns:
      the updated Transaction object with approved status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the transaction ID or OTP is invalid

    • refundPayment

      public Transaction refundPayment(String transactionId)

    • getTransactionHistory

      public List<Transaction> getTransactionHistory(String cardNumber)
      Retrieves the transaction history for a given credit card number.
      Parameters:
      cardNumber - the credit card number to search for transactions
      Returns:
      a list of transactions associated with the credit card

    • getTransactionStatus

      public String getTransactionStatus(String transactionId)

    • cancelTransaction

      public void cancelTransaction(String transactionId)

    • checkForFraud

      public boolean checkForFraud(String transactionId)

    • topupCreditCard

      public CreditCard topupCreditCard(String cardNumber, BigDecimal amount, String updatedBy) throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception
